overview: Hathaway Noa, still haunted by his past actions, joins a terrorist organization called Mufti and adopts the alias "Mufti Nabiyy Erin". Mufti is fighting a terrorist campaign against the Earth Federation government.
language: Spanish, Italian, French, German, English, Portuguese, Japanese

title: Detective Conan: The Scarlet Bullet
overview: Japan is celebrating the upcoming World Sports Games in Tokyo. The world's first vacuum-tube super-conducting linear train is built with the latest Japanese technology and timed to coincide with the WSG opening ceremonies.

title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Cursed by Light
overview: Meliodas and his friends jump back into action when the new era of peace is threatened by a powerful magical alliance that could spell the end for all.

title: Goblin Slayer: Goblin's Crown
overview: In a world dominated by monsters, a young priestess decides to train as an adventurer to deal with the threat. She joins a group of inexperienced fighters who have set out to drive the goblins away.

title: Detective Conan: The Bride of Halloween
overview: During the wedding of Takagi and Sato, an assailant breaks and tries to attack Sato. But Takagi protects her while getting injured. The attacker escapes, but the situation is settled, although Sato is rightfully rattled by it all.

title: Double World
overview: Seeing the neighboring country become more and more powerful, a warlord organizes a competition to reveal the best warriors. A young man is eager to bring honour to his clan.

title: New Gods: Nezha Reborn
overview: A normal young deliveryman Li Yunxiang, though coming from the slum area, is living a satisfying life but when the arrogant wealthy son of Boss beats him down, his deep anger turns into a blast of Truth Fire.

title: Snipers
overview: The story of sharpshooter Zhang Taofang, a young army recruit who at age 22 sets a record during the Korean War by reportedly killing or wounding 214 American soldiers with 435 shots in just 32 days.

title: The Yinyang Master
overview: Adaption of the phenomenon-level mobile game "Onmyoji" - film version with the same name that will bring the magnificent oriental fantasy world to life.

title: Jiang Ziya
overview: Banished to the mortal world, a warrior has to slay a demon to return to the heavenly realm and become a god.

title: End Game
overview: When an assassin loses his memory, an unsuccessful actor exchanges identities with him.
